title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 262.001 - Agritourism defined
text:
262.001.  Agritourism defined. — As used in the statutory laws of this state, "agritourism" means the act of visiting a working farm or any agricultural operation for the purpose of enjoyment, education, training, or active involvement in the activities of the agricultural operation.
(L. 2010 H.B. 2182)
